lines.speaker: Alon
lines.line: I saw you helping that merchant with her cart earlier. That was kind.

lines.speaker: Finn
lines.line: She was blocking the road. I wanted to leave. Don't romanticize it.

lines.speaker: Alon
lines.line: Maybe. But you could have walked around her instead.

lines.speaker: Finn
lines.line: Don't start. I just... the wheel was stuck. Would've bothered me.
